sentence: 这所学校办学多年，口碑很好。
pinyin: Zhè suǒ xué xiào bàn xué duō nián, kǒu bēi hěn hǎo.
english: This school has been running for many years and has an excellent reputation.

sentence: 绝大多数同学都同意这个方案。
pinyin: Jué dà duō shù tóng xué dōu tóng yì zhè ge fāng àn.
english: The vast majority of students agreed to the proposal.

meaning: 1. to write a play; 2. scenario; 3. dramatist; 4. screenwriter
sentence: 她是那部热门电视剧的编剧。
pinyin: Tā shì nà bù rè mén diàn shì jù de biān jù.
english: She is the screenwriter of that popular TV drama.

sentence: 这支股票今天下跌了两个点。
pinyin: Zhè zhī gǔpiào jīntiān xià diē le liǎng gè diǎn.
english: This stock dropped two points today.

sentence: 他的别号是“老顽童”，朋友都这么叫他。
pinyin: Tā de biéhào shì “lǎo wántóng”, péngyǒu dōu zhème jiào tā.
english: His alias is “Old Naughty Kid”, and his friends all call him that.

sentence: 这个软件支持多用户同时在线操作。
pinyin: Zhè gè ruǎn jiàn zhī chí duō yòng hù tóng shí zài xiàn cāo zuò.
english: This software supports multiple users operating online at the same time.

meaning: 1. curve; 2. curved line; 3. indirect; 4. in a roundabout way
sentence: 图表上的曲线显示销售额在持续上升。
pinyin: Tú biǎo shàng de qū xiàn xiǎn shì xiāo shòu é zài chí xù shàng shēng.
english: The curve on the chart shows that sales are continuing to rise.

sentence: 最近物价上涨，买菜花了不少钱。
pinyin: Zuìjìn wùjià shàngzhǎng, mǎi cài huā le bù shǎo qián.
english: Prices have gone up lately and groceries are costing a lot more.

meaning: 1. to accuse; 2. to charge; 3. to indict
sentence: 他控告邻居损坏了他的车。
pinyin: Tā kònggào línjū sǔnhuài le tā de chē.
english: He accused his neighbor of damaging his car.

meaning: 1. head; 2. director (of an organizational unit); 3. (police) commissi
sentence: 我们公司新来了一位市场总监。
pinyin: Wǒmen gōngsī xīn láile yī wèi shìchǎng zǒngjiān.
english: Our company has a new marketing director.

meaning: next period (week, month or quarter etc)
sentence: 下期杂志会有更多新内容。
pinyin: Xià qī zá zhì huì yǒu gèng duō xīn nèi róng.
english: The next issue of the magazine will have more new content.

sentence: 这类问题需要认真研究。
pinyin: Zhè lèi wèntí xūyào rènzhēn yánjiū.
english: This kind of problem requires careful study.

meaning: 1. balance (of an account, bill etc); 2. surplus; 3. remainder
sentence: 请查一下银行卡的余额。
pinyin: Qǐng chá yīxià yínhángkǎ de yú'é.
english: Please check the balance on the bank card.

sentence: 他在工商局办理了营业执照。
pinyin: Tā zài gōngshāng jú bànlǐle yíngyè zhízhào.
english: He applied for a business license at the industry and commerce bureau.

sentence: 银行收紧了信贷，贷款变得更难了。
pinyin: Yínháng shōujǐn le xìn dài, dàikuǎn biàn de gèng nán le.
english: The bank has tightened credit, making it harder to get loans.

sentence: 这款手机上市后销量很好。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒujī shàngshì hòu xiāoliàng hěn hǎo.
english: This phone sold very well after its release.

sentence: 他从小就梦想成为一名飞行员。
pinyin: Tā cóngxiǎo jiù mèngxiǎng chéngwéi yī míng fēixíngyuán.
english: He has dreamed of becoming a pilot since he was little.

meaning: 1. to donate money; 2. to contribute funds; 3. donation; 4. contributi
sentence: 他向慈善机构捐款了。
pinyin: Tā xiàng císhàn jīgòu juānkuǎn le.
english: He donated money to a charity.

sentence: 评价作品时要掌握好尺度。
pinyin: Píngjià zuòpǐn shí yào zhǎngwò hǎo chǐdù.
english: You need to apply the right yardstick when evaluating a work.

meaning: 1. the 10 heavenly stems 甲[jiǎ], 乙[yǐ], 丙[bǐng], 丁[dīng], 戊[wù], 己[jǐ]
sentence: 农历纪年用天干地支来表示。
pinyin: Nónglì jìnián yòng tiāngān dìzhī lái biǎoshì.
english: The lunar calendar uses the heavenly stems and earthly branches to mark years.

meaning: original (of a document); reserved copy (of a library book)
sentence: 合同要提交正本，复印件不被接受。
pinyin: Hé tong yào tí jiāo zhèng běn, fù yìn jiàn bú bèi jiē shòu.
english: You must submit the original of the contract; copies are not accepted.

sentence: 他是一位爱读书的知识分子。
pinyin: Tā shì yī wèi ài dúshū de zhīshi fènzǐ.
english: He is an intellectual who loves to read.

sentence: 他梦想有一天能环球旅行。
pinyin: Tā mèngxiǎng yǒu yī tiān néng huánqiú lǚxíng.
english: He dreams of traveling around the world someday.

meaning: 1. to appraise; 2. to evaluate; 3. to judge
sentence: 专家们花了两天时间评审这些作品。
pinyin: Zhuānjiāmen huā le liǎng tiān shíjiān píng shěn zhèxiē zuòpǐn.
english: The experts spent two days evaluating these works.

sentence: 邻居们形成了一个互帮互助的共同体。
pinyin: Línjūmen xíngchéng le yī gè hù bāng hù zhù de gòngtóngtǐ.
english: The neighbors formed a community of mutual support.

meaning: 1. genuine; 2. honest; 3. in good faith; 4. honesty; 5. integrity
sentence: 做生意最重要的是诚信。
pinyin: Zuò shēngyì zuì zhòngyào de shì chéng xìn.
english: The most important thing in doing business is honesty.

meaning: to be advantageous to; to be beneficial for
sentence: 多喝水有利于身体健康。
pinyin: Duō hē shuǐ yǒulìyú shēntǐ jiànkāng.
english: Drinking plenty of water is beneficial to your health.

sentence: 电子从高能级跃迁到低能级。
pinyin: Diànzǐ cóng gāo néng jí yuèqiān dào dī néng jí.
english: Electrons transition from a higher energy level to a lower one.

sentence: 摄影师用无人机拍摄了壮观的航拍。
pinyin: Shèyǐngshī yòng wúrénjī pāishè le zhuànguān de hángpāi.
english: The photographer used a drone to capture spectacular aerial footage.

sentence: 他属于公司里的新派管理风格。
pinyin: Tā shǔyú gōngsī lǐ de xīnpài guǎnlǐ fēnggé.
english: He represents the new-school management style in the company.

sentence: 他用本本在咖啡馆里工作。
pinyin: Tā yòng běnběn zài kāfēiguǎn lǐ gōngzuò.
english: He works at a café using his laptop.

sentence: 爷爷在家里安详地老死，享年九十岁。
pinyin: Yé ye zài jiā lǐ ān xiáng de lǎo sǐ, xiǎng nián jiǔ shí suì.
english: Grandpa passed away peacefully at home at the age of ninety.

sentence: 她加入了读书会，成为其中一员。
pinyin: Tā jiā rù le dú shū huì, chéng wéi qí zhōng yī yuán.
english: She joined the book club and became a member.

meaning: (idiom) nothing more than this; that's all; no big deal; not very impr
sentence: 传说中的美食也不过如此，没什么特别的。
pinyin: Chuán shuō zhōng de měi shí yě bù guò rú cǐ, méi shén me tè bié de.
english: The legendary food was nothing more than this — nothing particularly special about it.

sentence: 他每个月都在存钱，为了交学费。
pinyin: Tā měi gè yuè dōu zài cún qián, wèile jiāo xuéfèi.
english: He saves money every month to pay tuition.

sentence: 这片农田大约有五十公顷。
pinyin: Zhè piàn nóngtián dàyuē yǒu wǔshí gōngqǐng.
english: This farmland is about fifty hectares in size.

meaning: 1. to investigate and research; 2. research; 3. investigation
sentence: 我们去乡下做了一周的市场调研。
pinyin: Wǒmen qù xiāngxia zuò le yī zhōu de shìchǎng diào yán.
english: We went to the countryside to do a week of market research.

meaning: 1. to open; 2. to start (a business etc); 3. to set up
sentence: 她打算开办一家小型烘焙店。
pinyin: Tā dǎsuàn kāibàn yī jiā xiǎoxíng hōngbèi diàn.
english: She plans to open a small bakery.

meaning: 1. service desk; 2. information desk; 3. reception desk
sentence: 请到一楼服务台办理登记手续。
pinyin: Qǐng dào yī lóu fúwùtái bànlǐ dēngjì shǒuxù.
english: Please go to the service desk on the first floor to check in.

sentence: 她把面团揉成长条再切块。
pinyin: Tā bǎ miàntuán róu chéng cháng tiáo zài qiē kuài.
english: She kneaded the dough into a long strip and then cut it into pieces.

sentence: 海洋中的鱼类种类非常丰富。
pinyin: Hǎiyáng zhōng de yúlèi zhǒnglèi fēicháng fēngfù.
english: There are very many species of fish in the ocean.

sentence: 他大学学的是信息管理专业。
pinyin: Tā dà xué xué de shì xìn xī guǎn lǐ zhuān yè.
english: He majored in information management in college.

sentence: 这几十年来，许多发展中国家都变成了工业国。
pinyin: Zhè jǐ shí nián lái, xǔ duō fā zhǎn zhōng guó jiā dōu biàn chéng le gōng yè guó.
english: Over the past few decades, many developing countries have become industrialized nations.

meaning: easterly wind; spring breeze; (fig.) revolutionary momentum; favorable
sentence: 春天的东风吹来，天气暖和多了。
pinyin: Chūn tiān de dōng fēng chuī lái, tiān qì nuǎn huo duō le.
english: With the spring easterly wind blowing in, the weather has become much warmer.

sentence: 价格和销量往往成反比，这是基本规律。
pinyin: Jià gé hé xiāo liàng wǎng wǎng chéng fǎn bǐ, zhè shì jī běn guī lǜ.
english: Price and sales volume are often inversely proportional — that's a basic principle.

meaning: 1. to have as its purpose; 2. to be intended to; 3. to aim to (do sth)
sentence: 这项活动旨在提高大家的健康意识。
pinyin: Zhè xiàng huódòng zhǐzài tígāo dàjiā de jiànkāng yìshí.
english: This activity aims to raise everyone's health awareness.

sentence: 她时时记挂着家里的老人。
pinyin: Tā shíshí jìguà zhe jiālǐ de lǎorén.
english: She constantly thinks about the elderly at home.

sentence: 他对乳制品过敏，不能喝牛奶。
pinyin: Tā duì rǔ zhìpǐn guòmǐn, bù néng hē niúnǎi.
english: He is allergic to dairy products and cannot drink milk.

sentence: 探险队在丛林里迷路了好几个小时。
pinyin: Tànxiǎn duì zài cóng lín lǐ mílù le hǎo jǐ gè xiǎoshí.
english: The expedition team got lost in the jungle for several hours.

sentence: 这本书记录了他二十年的创业历程。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū jìlù le tā èrshí nián de chuàngyè lìchéng.
english: This book documents his twenty-year journey of building a business.
